name: Friskies Cat Beef Gravy 85g
description: From the first bite to the last lick of gravy, Friskies® excites your cat’s senses and fuels their natural curiosity. This complete and balanced recipe provides all the essential nutrients adult cats need to thrive - keeping them healthy, happy, and playful every day. Why Your Cat Will Love It • Tender chunks in irresistible gravy for a flavour - packed meal. • 100% complete and balanced nutrition for adult cats. • Supports vitality, playfulness, and overall well-being. • A mealtime adventure that satisfies taste, texture, and aroma cravings. Perfect For Everyday feeding for adult cats who love variety and rich gravy-based meals
